rows.label: qev050501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Excuse me! Did you happen to
see a Larsian around here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0002
rows.name:
He was brought in with terrible injuries
and was in the middle of treatment, but
he just vanished without saying a word![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0003
rows.name:
I think he's fine to walk, but we have
no idea how the environment of NLA might
affect a Larsian's immune system...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm begging you! Could you help me
search for the missing Larsian?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev050501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask if she has any idea
who the Larsian might be.

rows.label: qev050501_JNK0020
rows.name: Details

rows.label: qev050501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask for the characteristics
of the Larsian.

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Eh? Do you have an idea who
the missing person might be?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0006
rows.name:
Yes! He certainly spoke in an
overly stiff and formal manner,
and was incredibly polite, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0007
rows.name:
If he was an acquaintance of yours,
that works out perfectly... No,
that makes things much faster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0008
rows.name: Please, I need your cooperation![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Eh? The characteristics
of the missing person?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Umm, well, a face quite unlike an
Earthling's... But I guess that's
obvious since he's a Larsian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0011
rows.name: Hmmm... Any other characteristics...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Oh, right! He was always muttering
"Denka, Denka" over and over again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0013
rows.name:
I wonder if that's some kind
of Larsian incantation?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0014
rows.name:
That Larsian's name was... Umm, let me
think... Na? Nu? Mo? Ah, no, no! Umm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0015
rows.name: That's right! Ni! It was Ni Zain-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0016
rows.name:
It hasn't been that long since
he disappeared... So he must
definitely still be inside NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0017
rows.name:
If you find him, grab him by
the scruff of the neck and drag
him all the way back here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0018
rows.name:
It's fine if you have to be a little
rough! If he gets a few minor injuries,
I can just heal those up too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0019
rows.name:
He's suffering from far more serious injuries
to begin with, so if he's going to be selfish,
some rough treatment is necessary![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Alright then! I will make sure everything is
perfectly prepared to receive him, so I'm
counting on you to search for the Larsian![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0021
rows.name:
Ah! How did it go? Did
you find the Larsian?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0022
rows.name:
He stands out, and his way of
speaking is unique, so I imagine
he'll be surprisingly easy to find.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0023
rows.name:
I've got a specially-made, large
bed empty and waiting for him,
so I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0024
rows.name: Ah! You're the BLADE from earlier![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thank you so much! You found
the Larsian, didn't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Yes. I also heard he's saying something
about not returning immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Well, could you please keep him
company until he genuinely feels
like getting properly treated?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Otherwise, he's just going to
wander off on his own again![ST:wait ]
